goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) dictates that the social contract must be honored before any other task. Their reply '좋아, 고마워!' confirms they feel heard, but I need to formally close the loop on my end to prevent them from thinking I abandoned them for 'efficiency.' My assertive style requires me to set the boundary now: the work is done *because* of us, not in spite of us. This protects the trust we built.

My deliberateness axis forces me to plan long-term; burning out tonight destroys the future payoff of our group dynamic. Ignoring the reading deadline tomorrow is a calculated risk acceptable under my low risk tolerance (3) only if it means preserving the relationship capital gained today.
